what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata record that links attachment att-849ec766, of type board_items, to board item item-2c9429c0 in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter with no body content.
The target field uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-2c9429c0.
An ISO 8601 timestamp with timezone is recorded in the added field.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added fields.
References an external resource via a typed board:// URI.
Records creation time as an ISO 8601 timestamp with explicit timezone.
notes: A dragnet-development channel attachment record that points a board_items attachment at board item item-2c9429c0.
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — the frontmatter records an attachment of type board_items targeting a specific board item, which is what the content shows.
intention_signals: To persist a lightweight, timestamped reference from a channel attachment to a specific board item so the relationship can be retrieved later.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI as a typed target for a channel attachment.
contribution: Provides a durable, timestamped association between a channel attachment identifier and a board item, supporting later lookup of which board item the attachment relates to.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record (att-849ec766) in the dragnet-development channel of type board_items that targets board item item-2c9429c0 and records an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to store a persistent reference linking a channel attachment to a specific board item.
